name: Anika Rahman
bio: Met during freshman year at BUET. We used to pull all-nighters for exams together. She's now a software engineer in Dhaka.

name: Rafiul Hasan
bio: My senior at the office who helped me land my first real project. We grab lunch every couple of weeks to catch up.

name: Tasnim Jahan
bio: We grew up on the same street in Sylhet. Even though she moved to Chittagong, we still talk regularly and visit during Eid.

name: Mehedi Hossain
bio: My go-to travel partner from university. We backpacked through Cox's Bazar and the Sundarbans together. Haven't caught up in a while.

name: Nusrat Faria
bio: A colleague from my current team. We collaborate daily and often brainstorm ideas over tea after standups.

name: Sabbir Ahmed
bio: Best friend from high school in Rajshahi. We lost touch after he moved abroad for his masters but I really want to reconnect.

name: Lamia Sultana
bio: We were in the same study group for three years. She's super sharp and always kept us motivated during finals week.

name: Zarif Khan
bio: We met at the gym two years ago and now work out together almost every week. He got me into strength training seriously.

name: Priya Chakraborty
bio: My neighbor for six years before she shifted to Mirpur. We share a love for cooking and often exchange recipes over the phone.

name: Tanvir Hossain
bio: A senior I met at a tech event who later became a close mentor. He reviews my side projects and gives brutally honest feedback.
